name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Shoulder Bag. To celebrate the 70th anniversary of the classic horsebit element, the new series reinterprets the horsebit element, cleverly incorporating a dazzling crystal outer ring. This small shoulder bag is crafted from light green leather, featuring elegant and charming new elements such as crystal horsebit details, exuding a modern temperament. Light green leather, gold-tone crystal accessories, cotton-linen blend lining, horsebit detail on front, top handle, detachable leather shoulder strap (20cm high); detachable chain shoulder strap with interlocking double G (52cm high) Weight: approx. 0.7kg.
name_cn:

This small shoulder bag is crafted from light green leather, featuring elegant and charming new elements such as crystal horsebit details, exuding a modern temperament. Light green leather, gold-tone crystal accessories, cotton-linen blend lining, horsebit detail on front, top handle, detachable leather shoulder strap (20cm high); detachable chain shoulder strap with interlocking double G (52cm high) Weight: approx. 0.7kg.
Model: 735178.
Size: 13(L) x 24(W) x 5.5cm(H)
Color: Light Green/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
